option.name: VM_PARAMETERS
option.value: -Dfabric.dli.config=E:\Minecraft@@0020Dungeons@@0020For@@0020Java@@0020Edition\fabric\.gradle\loom-cache\launch.cfg -Dfabric.dli.env=client -Dfabric.dli.main=net.fabricmc.loader.impl.launch.knot.KnotClient "-Darchitectury.main.class=E:\Minecraft Dungeons For Java Edition\fabric\.gradle\architectury\.main_class" "-Darchitectury.runtime.transformer=E:\Minecraft Dungeons For Java Edition\fabric\.gradle\architectury\.transforms" "-Darchitectury.properties=E:\Minecraft Dungeons For Java Edition\fabric\.gradle\architectury\.properties" -Djdk.attach.allowAttachSelf=true "-javaagent:E:\Minecraft Dungeons For Java Edition\.gradle\architectury\architectury-transformer-agent.jar"
